Split.description: One split element in the split array

mask.description: File path to mask image (png) relative to preset.json

name.description: Name of the split/dummy, must not contain characters used by AutoSplit's file name options: ^#@{}()[]

threshold.description: Similarity threshold where this split will trigger, represented by a number between 0 and 1

pauseTime.description: Duration in seconds AutoSplit will pause its image detection after this split triggers

delay.description: Duration in milliseconds to delay the split time after this image triggers

dummy.description: Whether or not this is a dummy split, meaning this image will not trigger a split, but simply acts as a pre-requisite to the next image

inverted.description: Whether or not this split is inverted, meaning this split will trigger once the image drops below the given threshold after reaching it once
